Initial commit: ECU Mock Oral Platform

- Express.js server with SQLite database
- Admin panel for exam, credential, and file management
- One-time login credentials for examinees
- File upload support for PDFs and images
- Rate limiting and session-based authentication

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
